message:
test: add comprehensive tests for label-pattern and label-regex filtering

Adds 7 test cases covering:
- LabelPattern glob filtering in SearchIssues (5 sub-tests)
- LabelRegex filtering in SearchIssues (5 sub-tests)
- Invalid regex pattern error handling
- LabelPattern in GetReadyWork
- LabelRegex in GetReadyWork
- Invalid regex in GetReadyWork
- Combined pattern + regex filtering

Co-authored-by: paf0186 <paf0186@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
